title: Culpitt Select Pink Baking Cases, Greaseproof Paper Baking Cups, 50mm Cupcake Cases - Pack of 50
features: Greaseproof Baking Cases – Made from quality greaseproof food grade paper, the bright colour won't fade so your cupcakes, fairy cakes, or muffins will look brilliant when they come out of the oven.
Perfect For Any Occasion - Whether it's an everyday bake or a show-stopping celebration, Culpitt Select baking cases provide the foundations and you provide the flair!
Cupcake Decorations – These high quality coloured baking cases will help set the scene for a Valentines Day celebration, birthday party or any other occasion that calls for cupcakes!
Standard Size - These baking cups easily fit into standard sized cupcake trays so are easy to use for any occasion. Each case has a 50mm diameter base and is 40mm in height.

Pack of 50 - These simple and reliable packs of 50 cupcake cases are suitable for everyday home baking or for special occasions like birthdays, bake sales, or parties. Choose the colour to match your party theme and go wild with the cake decorating!
description: From the manufacturer Culpitt Select Baking Cases Greaseproof Paper Cupcake Cases Made from quality greaseproof paper, the bright colours won't fade so your cupcakes, fairy cakes, or muffins will look brilliant when they come out of the oven. Available in 9 bright, bold colours including red, blue, green, pink, and black. These simple and reliable packs of 50 cupcake cases are suitable for everyday home baking or for special occasions like birthdays, bake sales, or parties. Choose the colour to match your party theme and go wild with the cake decorating! 50mm x 40mm Food grade greaseproof paper Pack of 50 Standard 50mm Size Regular 50mm diameter ensures these cases fit in standard baking trays and are easy to use and fill. Premium Greaseproof Paper Thanks to the high quality greaseproof paper these cases will hold their shape and have the same bright colours after baking. 9 Vibrant Colours 9 bright colours in the range including yellow, red, white, and black. Culpitt Select With over 100 years of experience, Culpitt understands there are some things a professional cake maker and decorator simply can't live without. Culpitt Select is a range of cake essentials for all occasions. Culpitt Select Coloured Cake Candles Culpitt Select Greaseproof Paper Baking Cases Culpitt Select Silver Cake Boards Culpitt Select Kraft Brown Baking Cases Culpitt Select White Cake Boxes Culpitt Select Premium Foil Baking Cases Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 76 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,730 4.7 out of 5 stars 248 4.4 out of 5 stars 16 4.6 out of 5 stars 145 4.5 out of 5 stars 70 Price £5.79 £ 5 . 79 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 — no data £9.54 £ 9 . 54 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £10.68 £ 10 . 68 Pack Size 100 Pack 50 & 250 Packs 10 Pack 200 & 500 Packs 10 Pack 250 Pack Description Light up any celebration cake with these 100 Culpitt Select Cake Candles! Available in 12 colours including Red, Blue, Candy Stripe, Silver and Gold. Made from quality greaseproof food grade paper, the bright colour won't fade so your cupcakes, fairy cakes, or muffins will look brilliant when they come out of the oven. 9 bold colours to choose from. Lightweight 12mm Cake Drums are ideal for presenting your cakes, cupcakes, and bakes upon. 8" to 16" sizes. Present your cupcakes in style with these traditional Kraft brown baking cases from Culpitt Select. Perfect for a rustic chic or Boho wedding theme. These square cake boxes are perfect for keeping your freshly baked cakes free from damage. Each box is plain white, windowless, and 6 inches high, and includes an easy to fit lid. Made from high quality greaseproof food grade foil paper, the bright Gold colour won't fade so your cupcakes, fairy cakes, or muffins will look brilliant when they come out of the oven. 3 Colours to choose from.
